seo.description: Portfolio of Vladislav Adamets — Senior Frontend Developer with 7+ years of experience in React, Vue, TypeScript, Next.js and full-stack development.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Notes on frontend, architecture, and day-to-day engineering.

summary.title: About
summary.text: Senior Frontend Developer with 7+ years of experience...

company1.title: Mozen
company1.description: Full-cycle development across web and mobile platforms — React Native apps, Next.js web migration, Firebase and Parse Platform integrations in a Scrumban team.
tasks: Developed and maintained a cross-platform mobile app in React Native
Built native Android features in Kotlin alongside the React Native codebase
Migrated web application to Next.js with SSR support and PWA optimization
Integrated Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions) and Parse Platform for scalable backend
Set up CI/CD pipelines for both mobile and web applications
Participated in code reviews and contributed to architecture decisions
achievements: Delivered a cross-platform mobile app in React Native from scratch to production
Implemented Parse Platform with offline-first functionality and fast data sync

company2.title: ELM Technology
company2.description: Working on embeddable widget solutions and lead generation tools using Vue.js, with backend involvement in Python/Django to deliver full-cycle features.
tasks: Developed embeddable widgets in Vue 3 for integration into third-party platforms
Built an OSAGO insurance widget for the Wildberries marketplace
Built and maintained lead forms with complex validation and submission flows
Wrote unit and integration tests for Vue components to ensure stability
Contributed to backend development using Python and Django REST Framework

company3.title: Open Mobile Platform
company3.description: Technical lead for a developer portal — designed architecture, led the team, and delivered a full-featured platform with WIKI, CMS, smart search, and an intelligent assistant.
tasks: Designed architecture for the developer portal with focus on content publication speed
Led technical direction and managed a team of developers
Implemented WIKI, forum, CMS, and a search system with history and smart suggestions
Built an intelligent assistant integrated into the developer portal
Configured and supported GitLab CI/CD pipelines for automated builds and deployments
Authored full project documentation covering architecture, infrastructure, and deployment
achievements: Identified performance bottlenecks, developed and got approved a resolution plan
Automated build and deployment for dev environments via GitLab CI/CD
Wrote complete project documentation covering deployment, architecture, and infrastructure

company4.title: Getarent
company4.description: TechLead on a car-sharing marketplace — contributed to product strategy, led architecture decisions, built new features, and managed cloud infrastructure in Kubernetes.
tasks: Developed new marketplace features and improved existing ones in React / Next.js
Participated in strategic sessions with top management and investors
Designed new architectural solutions and defined team coding standards
Managed infrastructure: deployed and optimized services in Kubernetes on Yandex Cloud
Wrote SQL scripts for data extraction and migrated logic to database level (views, triggers, procedures)
Conducted technical interviews and supported team in task planning and estimation
achievements: Applied DDD architecture principles and design patterns for self-documented, scalable code
Integrated Strapi CMS into the project
Implemented full API and project structure documentation, improving design efficiency

company5.title: IT Special
company5.description: Worked across multiple client projects — from a popular video streaming service to school management systems, focusing on frontend development.
tasks: Developed web applications in TypeScript with React / Next.js and Vue / Nuxt.js
Led Nuxt 2 to Nuxt 3 migration and maintained legacy codebases
Designed and built a menuboard constructor with Quick Resto integration
Developed a school schedule module for the iDesk system
Optimized Webpack build configuration on existing projects
Conducted technical interviews and prepared test assignments for candidates
achievements: Built a frontend design system and successfully managed and mentored a junior developer
Worked on a popular video streaming service

company6.title: Consalt Info
company6.description: Delivered a wide range of commercial projects — from admin panels and booking platforms to mobile apps and interactive 3D maps — growing from execution to active architectural involvement.
tasks: Participated in developing an admin panel for managing suppliers, logistics, orders, and advertising
Developed a psychologist matching platform with booking and personal accounts
Created a 3D building map with apartment selection and application submission
Built a flower bouquet color configurator
Contributed to design system development and architecture discussions
Led sprint planning, task estimation, and team task distribution
achievements: Delivered 2 React Native mobile apps to production
Confidently mastered Vue 2 and transitioned to Composition API
Gained experience in Bitrix 24 portal feature development

company7.title: ADD.Orange
company7.description: Started professional career building client websites and internal tools — from WordPress and Bitrix projects to custom React applications, independently handling frontend and backend.
tasks: Designed project architecture and selected tech stacks for client projects
Developed WordPress and Bitrix websites with custom themes and admin panels
Built an informational portal with a custom PHP admin panel from scratch
Administered servers independently
Implemented pixel-perfect layouts
achievements: Delivered 2 full projects end-to-end — from client discussions to production
Built confident React knowledge enabling entry into large commercial projects
